name: Existing noticeNumber with wrong payeeId → PD_RTP_NOT_DELIVERED
description:
Given an RTP is sent successfully (status SENT) for a given noticeNumber + payeeId,
when the payee queries the delivery-status endpoint with the correct noticeNumber
but a different payeeId,
then the response must be HTTP 200 with status=PD_RTP_NOT_DELIVERED, verifying
that the endpoint filters on both fields.
descriptionHtml:
Given an RTP is sent successfully (status SENT) for a given noticeNumber + payeeId,
when the payee queries the delivery-status endpoint with the correct noticeNumber
but a different payeeId,
then the response must be HTTP 200 with status=PD_RTP_NOT_DELIVERED, verifying
that the endpoint filters on both fields.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Debtor activation failed: 503 503 Service Temporarily Unavailable

503 Service Temporarily Unavailable

nginx
assert 503 == 201 + where 503 = .status_code

""" fiscal_code: str = fake_fc() activation_response = activate( debtor_service_provider_token_a, fiscal_code, secrets.debtor_service_provider.service_provider_id, ) > assert activation_response.status_code == 201, ( f'Debtor activation failed: {activation_response.status_code} {activation_response.text}' ) E AssertionError: Debtor activation failed: 503 E 503 Service Temporarily Unavailable E E
